summary: Bryan Cantrill celebrates his DTrace colleague Adam Leventhal joining Sun's blogging community. He playfully notes that convincing their teammate Mike to blog would be as difficult as getting the A-Team's B.A. Baracus to fly. The brief post reflects the early days of developer blogging at Sun Microsystems.
key_points: Adam Leventhal has started blogging at Sun
Team DTrace aims for 'maximal blogging power'
money_quotes: Now if we can only convince Mike to start a blog (a feat that can only be compared to getting B.A. Baracus to fly), Team DTrace will be at maximal blogging power…
key_insight: Developer evangelism through blogging was becoming an important part of open source project promotion in the mid-2000s.
